input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.9.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.9.3.2
            TITLE: tractive system active must not be possible until both:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.9.3.2: Tractive System Active must not be possible until both:
EV.9.3.2 Tractive System Active must not be possible until both: 
• GLV System is Energized 
• Shutdown Circuit is Closed
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 107 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer:
Tractive System Active must not be possible until both:
• GLV System is Energized
• Shutdown Circuit is Closed
